commands.review_summary:
The PR reorders managed-service update handoff cwd candidates to prefer the resolved OpenClaw package root and updates the handoff test expectation.

PR surface: Source 0, Tests +2. Total +2 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: no. live high-confidence reproduction was established in this read-only review. Source inspection supports the cwd-order failure because current main prefers os.homedir before the package root while the handoff command can depend on cwd-sensitive argv1 resolution.
